zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Thwaites於1476年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，她的父親Edmund Thwaite26歲，母親Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield22歲。她於1497年與John Mallory在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1523年在英國越可爾享年47歲，埋葬在英國越可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Thwaites于1476年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，她的父亲Edmund Thwaite26岁，母亲Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield22岁。她于1497年与John Mallory在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1523年在英国越可爾享年47岁，埋葬在英国越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Thwaites
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the northern English placename Thwaite (Old Norse thveit ‘meadow, paddock’) + plural or post-medieval excrescent -s. The plural form is found in several placenames, including Thwaites in Keighley (Yorkshire), which is a principal source of the surname.

variants.name: Threatt
meanings: English (Norfolk): variant of Thwaites , also by folk etymology to resemble the vocabulary word threat. This form of the surname is no longer found in England.

variants.name: Tuite
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Conan.
Irish (Leinster; of Norman origin): habitational name from any of several places called Le Thuit in Eure, France, named with Old Norse thveit ‘meadow’. Compare Thwaites .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Thwaites was born in 1476, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Edmund Thwaite, was 26 and her mother, Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield, was 22. She married John Mallory in 1497, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1523, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Thwaites est née en 1476, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edmund Thwaite, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John Mallory en 1497, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1523, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Thwaites 1476 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund Thwaite 26 und ihre Mutter Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield 22. Sie hat 1497 in Yorkshire, England John Mallory geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1523 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Yorkshire, England und wurde in Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Thwaites è nata il nel 1476 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Edmund Thwaite, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato John Mallory nel 1497, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1523, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolta a Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Thwaitesが1476年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Edmund Thwaiteは26歳，母Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfieldは22歳であった。1497年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでJohn Malloryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1523年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで47歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Thwaites(이)가 1476년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Thwaite(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1497년 영국 요르크실르에서 John Mallory(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1523년 영국 요르크실르에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Thwaites nasceu em 1476, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edmund Thwaite, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com John Mallory em 1497, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1523, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultada em Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Thwaites родилась в 1476 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Edmund Thwaite было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Mallory в 1497 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1523 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Thwaites nació en 1476, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Edmund Thwaite, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield, tenía 22 años. Se casó con John Mallory en 1497, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1523, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultada en Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
